## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows [CLAUDE.md](CLAUDE.md) coding standards
- [ ] No `std::cout`/`std::cerr` (use spdlog)
- [ ] No raw `new`/`delete` (use smart pointers)
- [ ] No C-style casts (use `static_cast`)
- [ ] Commit messages follow Conventional Commits
